所有程序包|所有类和接口|序列化表格

A

AccountBookControllerImpl - controller.Impl中的类
The ledger controller implementation class handles the search, filtering and date processing logic of financial records.
AccountBookControllerImpl(UserControllerImpl) - 类的构造器 controller.Impl.AccountBookControllerImpl
Constructs the account book controller.
AccountBookControllerImpl.CSVUtils - controller.Impl中的类
CSV file processing tool class.
AccountBookControllerImpl.ProcessedDates - controller.Impl中的记录类
Record for processed date range.
AccountBookControllerImpl.Record - controller.Impl中的记录类
 
AccountBookUi - view中的接口
 
AccountBookUiImpl - view.Impl中的类
Implementation of the account book user interface, responsible for UI construction and interaction logic.
AccountBookUiImpl(JPanel, UserControllerImpl) - 类的构造器 view.Impl.AccountBookUiImpl
Initializes the UI with the main content panel and user controller.
AccountBookWindow() - 接口中的方法 view.AccountBookUi
 
AccountBookWindow() - 类中的方法 view.Impl.AccountBookUiImpl
Constructs the main account book window with control panel and result display area.
addEntry(Entry) - 类中的方法 controller.Impl.ImportControllerImpl
Appends a financial entry to the CSV file.
addEntry(Entry) - 接口中的方法 controller.ImportController
将新账目追加写入CSV文件。
AIAnalyzeControllerImpl - controller.Impl中的类
AI Financial Analysis Controller that generates budget reports using the DeepSeek API.
AIAnalyzeControllerImpl(UserControllerImpl) - 类的构造器 controller.Impl.AIAnalyzeControllerImpl
Initializes the AI analysis controller with the user's financial data path.
AIAnalyzeUi - view中的接口
 
AIAnalyzeUiImpl - view.Impl中的类
UI implementation for AI financial analysis, providing an interface to generate and view AI-driven budget reports.
AIAnalyzeUiImpl(JPanel, UserControllerImpl) - 类的构造器 view.Impl.AIAnalyzeUiImpl
Initializes the AI analysis UI with necessary dependencies.
AIAnalyzeWindow() - 接口中的方法 view.AIAnalyzeUi
 
AIAnalyzeWindow() - 类中的方法 view.Impl.AIAnalyzeUiImpl
Constructs and displays the AI analysis window with result area and analysis button.
amount() - 记录类中的方法 controller.Impl.AccountBookControllerImpl.Record
返回 amount 记录组件的值。
analyzeBudgetWithDeepSeek(String) - 类中的方法 controller.Impl.AIAnalyzeControllerImpl
Analyzes CSV financial data and generates AI budget suggestions.
analyzeWithAI(DefaultTableModel, JPanel) - 类中的方法 controller.Impl.ImportControllerImpl
Uses AI to automatically classify categories for financial entries (async execution).
analyzeWithAI(DefaultTableModel, JPanel) - 接口中的方法 controller.ImportController
调用AI模型对所有账目的描述进行自动分类。
autoSave() - 类中的方法 view.Impl.ImportUiImpl
Saves table changes to CSV automatically when data is updated.
